title: New Bandwidth-Cavell Research: EMEA Enterprises Face a Pivotal Moment in AI Adoption Amid Rising Regulation, Trust Pressures
description: Survey of EMEA enterprise IT and telecom leaders finds security, trust and adaptability now outweigh rapid transformation in enterprise communications strategies RALEIGH, N.C., and LONDON, Feb. 24, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Enterprise communications leaders across the Europe, Middle East and...

title: Baker Hughes wins order for 25 generators for AI data centers
Is AI coming for your job? CEO warns 50% of entry-level white-collar jobs at risk
description: AI technology has greatly advanced in replacing roles in data, routine analysis, and administrative tasks.

title: AI structurally changing IT biz mix, Jefferies warns of managed services shrinkage ahead
description: The IT services sector faces a major change. Artificial intelligence will reshape how companies operate. This shift will increase business cycles and demand new talent strategies. Operating models will need significant updates. These changes introduce new risks for the industry. Investors are advised to be selective as the sector navigates this transformation.

title: US GDP: AI imports offset investment boost – TD Securities
description: TD Securities’ US Macro Strategist Eli Nir analyzes how Artificial Intelligence-related activity affected US GDP in Q4 2025. Strong AI-driven fixed investment lifted Private Domestic Final Purchases, but a surge in computer and semiconductor imports dragged headline GDP lower.
